name: Block Explorer
title: NexScan — Blockchain Explorer
description: Premium blockchain explorer with bright light theme, clean white card surfaces on soft gray (#f5f6fa) background, and bold vivid solid accent colors (blue, purple, orange, green). No gradients or glows — pure flat design. Sticky topbar with NexScan branding, nav tabs (Overview, Blocks, Transactions, Tokens, Validators), live Mainnet indicator, and real-time clock. Hero search section with bold title, monospace input, filter dropdown, and blue search button. Scrolling token price ticker with CoinGecko real-time data. Four vivid-colored network stat cards (Block Height on blue, Transactions 24h on purple, Gas Price on orange with low/avg/fast tiers, ETH Price on green) with white text. Bento Grid layout: Transaction Volume line chart (24H/7D/30D controls), Gas Tracker multi-line chart, Latest Blocks list, Latest Transactions list. Tab pages for Blocks table, Transactions table with method badges and direction arrows, Token Tracker with inline sparkline charts, Validators table with uptime bars and status badges. Inter + JetBrains Mono typography. Chart.js for all charts. Card hover lift effects. Fully responsive with mobile nav overlay.

typography.style: Inter for UI, JetBrains Mono for data/hashes. Bold vivid solid accent colors on white cards.

layoutDetails: Sticky topbar with brand + nav + live indicator. Hero search with blue accent. Bento Grid (12-column) for charts and data panels. Tab-based navigation for detail pages.
visualStyle: Premium light dashboard. Clean white surfaces on soft gray base with bold vivid solid accent colors (blue, purple, orange, green). Flat design with no gradients or glows. Bento Grid layout with Chart.js visualizations.

name: Crypto News
title: CryptoWire — Crypto News Aggregator
description: Crypto news aggregator with clean light editorial design on white (#ffffff) and soft gray (#f5f6fa) backgrounds. Scrolling price ticker with live indicator. Header with CryptoWire branding, pill-style category nav (All, Market, DeFi, NFT, Regulation, Technology), search with focus ring. Two-column layout: main content with featured breaking story (blue left border, BREAKING badge), news grid with hover side-accent, sidebar with trending coins, market snapshot, top movers, newsletter signup. Space Grotesk geometric headings with Inter body text. Chart.js for sentiment gauge and social mentions. Blue (#3b82f6) primary accent with cyan, green, and red semantic colors.

typography.style: Clean editorial. Geometric sans-serif headings with readable body text. Blue accent on white.

layoutDetails: Two-column: main content (70%) + sidebar (30%). Featured story with blue left border, news grid with hover side-accent.
visualStyle: Light editorial magazine. Clean white surfaces on soft gray base with blue (#3b82f6) primary accent. Flat design with subtle borders. Space Grotesk geometric headings.

name: Crypto Portfolio
title: CRYPTOFOLIO — Portfolio Dashboard
description: Crypto portfolio dashboard with dark theme (#0A0A0A background) and red (#c45c5c) accent. Navbar with CRYPTOFOLIO branding, search, nav (Dashboard, Analytics, History), gradient wallet button. Hero stats with hover lift effect. Portfolio value line chart. Allocation donut chart. Holdings table with hover slide-in accent border. Market movers cards with scale-up hover. Three tab pages: Dashboard, Analytics (P&L trend, risk assessment), History (activity chart, filterable transaction table). Real-time CoinGecko data with fallback. Inter + Bebas Neue typography.

typography.style: Clean sans-serif with condensed display font for large numbers

layoutDetails: Full-width navbar, centered container. Stats row at top, chart and table below.
visualStyle: Dark fintech dashboard. Red accent on pure black base. Clean cards with subtle borders. Data-rich with charts.

name: Crypto Trade Frontend
title: CryptoTrade — Trading Platform
description: Premium crypto trading terminal with deep space glassmorphism design, particle network + wave line canvas background, and four fully functional pages. Trade page: three-column grid with glassmorphism panels, candlestick chart (Lightweight Charts), order book with gradient depth bars, order panel with animated Buy/Sell tabs. Markets page: full token table with staggered row entrance. Portfolio page: Connect Wallet with shimmer gradient button. Earn page: glassmorphism staking cards with glowing APY numbers. Purple-to-pink gradient accent system (#7c6cf0). CoinGecko API with animated price transitions.

typography.style: Premium dual-font system: Inter for UI, JetBrains Mono for data.

layoutDetails: Three-column trading grid with glassmorphism panels. Left: market list. Center: chart + order book. Right: order form.
visualStyle: Premium trading terminal. Deep space dark theme with purple-to-pink gradient accent system. Glassmorphism panels with backdrop blur. Particle network canvas.

name: DeFi Tracker
title: DeFiScope — DeFi Portfolio Tracker
description: DeFi portfolio tracker with premium light dashboard design on soft gray (#f0f2f7) background with clean white card surfaces. Left sidebar with DeFiScope branding, nav sections with emerald active indicator. Dashboard: vivid-colored metric cards (emerald, blue, purple, amber), portfolio value chart, protocol allocation donut, top DeFi protocols table (Aave, Uniswap, Lido). Emerald (#10b981) primary accent. Plus Jakarta Sans + Fira Code typography. Canvas background hidden in light theme.

typography.style: Modern geometric sans-serif with monospace for data. Clean light theme.

layoutDetails: Two-column: white sidebar (250px) + main content on gray base. Dashboard grid layout.
visualStyle: Premium light dashboard. Clean white surfaces on soft gray base with vivid solid accent colors (emerald, blue, purple, amber). Flat design with subtle borders.

name: DeFi Yield
title: FORGEFI — DeFi Yield Farm
description: DeFi yield farming platform with clean light theme on white (#ffffff) and soft gray (#f5f6fa) backgrounds. Navbar with FORGEFI branding in Bebas Neue uppercase, nav (Farms, Pools, Swap, Bridge, Docs), Connect Wallet button with blue accent. Liquidity pools with hover slide-in blue accent border and APY highlight. Expandable pool details with deposit/withdraw forms. Blue (#3b82f6) primary accent with emerald green for positive values. Canvas background hidden in light theme.

typography.style: Clean sans-serif with condensed display font for TVL/APY. Light theme with blue accent.

layoutDetails: Single-page vertical scroll. Navbar, stats row, pool cards list. Expandable details.
visualStyle: Light DeFi platform. Clean white surfaces on soft gray base with blue (#3b82f6) accent. Flat design with subtle borders. Uniswap/PancakeSwap-inspired layout.

name: DEX Aggregator
title: NEXSWAP — DEX Aggregator
description: DEX aggregator with dark teal-black aesthetic (#0a1214 background). Navbar with NEXSWAP in Orbitron font, nav (Swap, Routes, Analytics, Docs), glowing Connect Wallet. Swap card with expanding glow border and shimmer button. DEX comparison rows with slide-in hover. Neon green (#00ff88) accent on dark teal base. Scanline overlay. Chart.js analytics. CoinGecko real-time data.

typography.style: Sci-fi display font with geometric body. Dark teal cyberpunk aesthetic.

layoutDetails: Single-page centered. Stats bar, swap card, route comparison, trades table.
visualStyle: Dark teal cyberpunk. Neon green on dark teal-black. Scanline overlay, glowing effects. Shimmer swap button.

name: Market Overview
title: CRYPTOVIEW — Market Overview
description: Crypto market overview with dark industrial design (#111110 background) and noise texture overlay. Narrow icon sidebar with CRYPTOVIEW branding, nav icons with hover tooltips. Sortable market table with rank, price, change, cap, volume, sparklines. Category filter tabs (All, DeFi, L1, Meme). Watchlist, Portfolio, Settings pages. Anton display font. IBM Plex Mono for data. Red (#f87171) accent. Real-time CoinGecko with fallback.

typography.fontFamily: Anton + Barlow Condensed + IBM Plex Mono
typography.style: Bold display font with condensed body and monospace data. Industrial dark aesthetic.

layoutDetails: Narrow icon sidebar (60px) + full main content. Hero strip, search, stats, data table. Noise texture overlay.
visualStyle: Dark industrial. Red/white accent on near-black base. Bold typography with monospace data. Bloomberg-inspired. Noise texture overlay.

name: NFTAI Marketplace
title: NFTAI — NFT Marketplace Template
description: Full-featured NFT marketplace with multi-page layout (index, explore, nft-detail, login, sign-up, market-wallet). Dark theme (#161616 background). Fixed header with nav and wallet connect. Hero with featured collection. Live auction section with countdown. Top sellers with creator profiles. Explore section with filterable NFT grid (Art, Music, Domain, Virtual, Trading Cards). NFT cards with hover effects. Footer with newsletter and social links. Bootstrap CSS framework. Multiple page templates for complete marketplace flow.

typography.style: Clean system fonts. NFT marketplace standard.

layoutDetails: Multi-page scroll. Full-width sections with container centering. Grid for NFT cards.
visualStyle: Dark NFT marketplace. Yellow-green (#ddf247) accent on dark gray. NFT card hover effects. Countdown timers. Multi-page flow.

name: On-Chain Dashboard
title: ONCHAIN.io — On-Chain Intelligence Dashboard
description: Professional on-chain intelligence dashboard with premium light theme on soft gray (#f0f2f7) background with clean white card surfaces. Inspired by Dune Analytics and Arkham Intelligence. Sticky topbar with ONCHAIN branding, search box with focus ring, live indicator, real-time clock, and Connect Wallet button. Network overview with chain selector tabs (Ethereum, BSC, Polygon, Arbitrum), four vivid-colored stat cards. Bento grid layout: transaction volume bar chart, gas tracker line chart, hot tokens table with sparklines, DeFi TVL rankings with colored progress bars, whale activity live feed, market dominance doughnut chart. My Portfolio section. CoinGecko API with fallback. Inter + JetBrains Mono typography. Blue (#3b82f6) primary accent. Canvas background hidden in light theme.

typography.style: Clean Inter for UI, JetBrains Mono for all data values. Light theme with vivid accents.

layoutDetails: Single-page layout with sticky topbar. Max-width 1400px centered content. 12-column bento grid. Canvas background hidden in light theme.
visualStyle: Premium light intelligence dashboard. Clean white surfaces on soft gray base with vivid solid accent colors (blue, violet, emerald, amber). Flat design with subtle borders. Bento grid layout.

name: Staking Platform
title: STAKEHAUS — Staking Protocol
description: Staking protocol with dark industrial design (#111110 background) and noise texture overlay. Narrow icon sidebar with STAKEHAUS branding and nav icons with hover tooltips. Main content with hero strip 'STAKE YOUR ASSETS'. Stats row: Total Value Staked, Average APY, Total Rewards Paid, Active Stakers. Staking pool rows with hover slide and APY glow. Stake buttons with hover scale. Position progress bars. Stake/Unstake tab toggle. Asset selector modal. Staking calculator with duration buttons. Analytics page with reward history bar chart and allocation breakdown. Settings page with toggle switches. Anton display font. Barlow Condensed body. IBM Plex Mono for data. Red (#f87171) accent. Real-time CoinGecko with fallback.

typography.fontFamily: Anton + Barlow Condensed + IBM Plex Mono
typography.style: Bold display font with condensed body and monospace data. Industrial dark aesthetic.

layoutDetails: Narrow icon sidebar (60px) + main content. Hero strip, stats row, pool cards. Noise texture overlay. Multi-page: Dashboard, Stake, Analytics, Settings.
visualStyle: Dark industrial. Red accent on near-black base. Bold typography. Lido/Rocket Pool-inspired. Noise texture overlay. Sidebar icon hover tooltips, pool row hover slide, stake button hover scale.

name: Token Analytics
title: TokenScope — Crypto Token Analytics
description: Premium token analytics platform with dark glassmorphism design (#0a0e1a background) and data flow canvas background animation (horizontal streaming data points). Left sidebar with TokenScope branding and backdrop blur, nav sections with gradient active indicator (Analytics: Search Tokens, Trending, Compare; Market: Rankings). Glassmorphism topbar with search input with focus ring glow and animated dropdown. Token detail view with gradient top border, price chart, key metrics in glassmorphism detail items with hover elevation, price change badges. Trending tokens grid with gradient overlay reveal on hover. Compare view with animated VS badge. Quick-pick buttons. Staggered card entrance animations. Deep space dark theme with indigo-violet (#8b5cf6) gradient accent system. Nunito typography with Source Code Pro for data.

typography.style: Rounded sans-serif with monospace for data. Friendly yet professional.

layoutDetails: Sidebar (240px) + main content. Multi-view: search, detail, trending, compare, rankings. Data flow canvas background.
visualStyle: Dark analytics platform. Violet accent on deep navy. Glassmorphism cards. Multi-view dashboard. CoinGecko-inspired. Data flow canvas animation. Search box focus glow, stat card hover lift, trending card hover scale.

name: Wallet Dashboard
title: MochiWallet — Multi-Chain Dashboard
description: Multi-chain wallet dashboard with dark theme (#0e0d14 background) and coral (#ff9b9b) accent. Floating background shapes with lavender and coral colors. Left sidebar with MochiWallet branding (mochi emoji), nav groups (Main: Dashboard, Assets, Activity, Contacts; Tools: Settings), network status. Topbar with search, notifications, wallet address. Dashboard: total balance card with hover lift, chain tabs with hover elevation, action cards with radial glow hover effect, token list items with hover slide, transaction items with hover slide, address book items with hover slide. Portfolio mini chart. Gas tracker with speed selection. QR code display. Comfortaa + Nunito fonts. Pastel coral/lavender accents on dark base.

typography.style: Rounded, playful fonts. Friendly and approachable. Coral accent.

layoutDetails: Sidebar (240px) + main content. Topbar with search. Dashboard grid with cards and charts. Floating background shapes.
visualStyle: Dark with pastel accents. Playful, rounded design. Friendly wallet UI. Coral/lavender palette on dark base. Floating background shapes. Balance hero hover lift, chain tab hover elevation, action card radial glow hover.

name: Whale Tracker
title: WHALEWATCHER — On-Chain Whale Tracker
description: On-chain whale tracker with pure black (#0a0a0a) industrial aesthetic and noise texture overlay. Glassmorphism header with whale emoji branding, tab nav with glow effects (LIVE FEED, TOP WALLETS, FLOW ANALYSIS, CONCENTRATION), live indicator with pulse. Scrolling price ticker. Live feed tab shows large transaction cards with slide-in animation, hover translate and colored shadow. Top wallets tab with ranked whale addresses and hover highlight. Flow analysis with exchange inflow/outflow charts. Concentration tab with supply distribution. Stats strip with hover scale effect. Neon green (#00ff88) primary accent. Barlow Condensed + IBM Plex Mono fonts. Bold condensed typography.

typography.style: Condensed industrial font with monospace for addresses and amounts. Pure black with green accent.

layoutDetails: Single-page with tab navigation. Header, ticker, then tab content areas. Noise texture overlay.
visualStyle: Dark industrial. Neon green accent on pure black. Noise texture overlay. Glassmorphism header. Transaction slide-in animation. Wallet address hover glow. Tab fade-in transition. Stats hover scale.
